scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && echo 'export * from "./generated/api";' > ../api-zod/src/index.ts && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
scripts.codegen:check: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && echo 'export * from "./generated/api";' > ../api-zod/src/index.ts && git diff --exit-code -- ../api-zod/src ../api-client-react/src/generated || (echo 'ERROR: Generated API files are out of sync with the OpenAPI spec. Run pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen to regenerate.' && exit 1)
